WorkloadSpec.pathToFile: Path to the workload trace directory (a set of Parquet files).
WorkloadSpec.sampleFraction: Fraction of tasks to sample from the trace. Must be greater than 0.
WorkloadSpec.submissionTime: Optional absolute time (ISO-8601) to align the first task submission to.
ScenarioTopologySpec.pathToFile: Path to a topology JSON file describing the clusters and hosts.
